ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical location from which the tweet was posted */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter for Android, Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains sensitive content */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet might contain sensitive content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "description" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., planning, ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the sentiment */,
  "sentiment_model_version" TEXT /* Version of the sentiment analysis model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relevance" (
  "relevance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relevance assessment */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being assessed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being assessed against */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the tweet to the project (relevant, irrelevant) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the relevance assessment */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the relevance */,
  "relevance_model_version" TEXT /* Version of the relevance assessment model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relevance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relevance_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relevance_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sarcasm" (
  "sarcasm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sarcasm detection */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "sarcasm" TEXT /* Presence of sarcasm in the tweet (true, false) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sarcasm detection */,
  "sarcasm_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the sarcasm level */,
  "sarcasm_model_version" TEXT /* Version of the sarcasm detection model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sarcasm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sarcasm_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being tracked */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the tweet */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets for the tweet */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies for the tweet */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been viewed */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate (calculated as (likes + retweets + replies) / impression_count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtag" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet using the hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the hashtag in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtag_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the mention */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being mentioned */,
  "mention_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the mentioned user in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* Text of the URL */,
  "url_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the URL in the dataset */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the photo */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "photo_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the photo in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the video in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet in the thread */,
  "parent_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent tweet in the thread */,
  "thread_length" INTEGER /* Length of the tweet thread (number of tweets in the thread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_threads_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the poll */,
  "poll_question" TEXT /* Text of the poll question */,
  "poll_status" TEXT /* Status of the poll (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "poll_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll containing the option */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the poll option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_options_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll option being voted for */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the option */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who voted */,
  "voter_location" TEXT /* Location of the user who voted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_votes_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES poll_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trend */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "user_engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (like, retweet, reply) */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Number of engagements of the specified type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the project manager */,
  "manager_title" TEXT /* Title of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
